Interface IGeometricXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a geometric transform.

[Guid("E6924FCB-4067-491B-A731-C175917A4AF7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeometricXform : IGeodataXform
